pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh (OUTPUT_FILE variable) and task.json description
Found in setup_task.sh (where it writes ground truth JSON) and export_result.sh (where it copies from)

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically selects a synthetic patient (derived from the Synthea dataset) from the OpenMRS instance. It records their demographics, allergies, conditions, and vitals into /tmp/ground_truth.json. The agent must summarize this data and save it to /home/ga/patient_summary.txt.
